config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before individual rights, because once you give the collective too much power, it becomes easy to justify abuse, censorship, and discrimination in the name of "the greater good." In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, then asks people to contribute to the common good within fair limits. From my perspective, social order matters, but it should never be used to erase basic personal freedoms.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah mayoritas atau negara bertindak sewenang-wenang. Tentu ada keadaan darurat tertentu di mana kepentingan publik perlu dibatasi sementara, tetapi itu harus sangat ketat dan tidak boleh menjadi alasan permanen untuk mengorbankan kebebasan dasar. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat dibangun dari individu yang haknya dilindungi, bukan dari individu yang terus-menerus dikorbankan atas nama kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule, because in Indonesia we know how easily “public interest” can become a cover for abuse by officials, mobs, or the majority. Social harmony matters to me, but harmony that depends on silencing people, punishing minorities, or ignoring due process is not real harmony. The state should protect both the common good and basic rights, but when they clash, individual rights need strong protection so power does not swallow the person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kepentingan masyarakat, bukan sebaliknya. Dari pengalaman saya melihat politik di Amerika, alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan berbicara, privasi, dan perlakuan yang adil terhadap minoritas. Memang ada keadaan darurat tertentu di mana kepentingan publik bisa sementara didahulukan, tetapi itu harus sempit, terukur, dan diawasi ketat agar tidak berubah menjadi kebiasaan. Masyarakat yang kuat justru lahir ketika negara dan mayoritas tidak bisa begitu saja mengorbankan individu demi tujuan yang terdengar mulia.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support putting society’s interests above individual rights as a general principle, because in Indonesia that idea too easily becomes a tool for officials or majorities to silence dissent and excuse unfair treatment. Social harmony is important, but real harmony cannot be built on fear, forced conformity, or the sacrifice of minorities. The common good matters, yet it should be pursued within firm limits that protect due process, free expression, and basic dignity. When the state or the crowd gets too much power, it is usually the individual who pays first.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena, dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika, hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kepentingan masyarakat. Saya justru melihat bahwa ketika “demi masyarakat” dijadikan alasan, negara atau mayoritas sering terlalu mudah menginjak kebebasan berbicara, privasi, dan perlakuan adil terhadap minoritas. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hanya sah jika dibatasi ketat, sementara, dan diawasi dengan kuat. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling konsisten melindungi hak dasar semua orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
